sourcePrompt: A modest Vietnamese rural schoolhouse, a single-story rectangular building about ten meters long. Plain timber-plank walls under a low-pitched corrugated-tin roof, a row of three large shuttered window openings down the long classroom side, and a small covered entrance porch at one end with a step up. Weathered wood, rusty tin, orderly. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
